ValidationRule.description: Prevents stage change to Bid Won or Opportunity Won if Backoffice_Review_Sent__c is not null and HR_Review_Complete__c is not TRUE.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( ISCHANGED(Stage__c), NOT (ISNULL (Backoffice_Review_Sent__c)) , OR( ISPICKVAL(Stage__c , "Bid Won"), ISPICKVAL(Stage__c , "Opportunity Won")), HR_Review_Complete__c <> TRUE
)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: HR review must be complete before moving forward to won stage
